security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Casual RAS controller — view a shared screen over a peer-to-peer link.
bundle.longDescription: The technician/support side of Casual RAS. Paste a connection ticket to view another machine's screen over an encrypted peer-to-peer (Iroh/QUIC) link, and point at the screen with a remote cursor. View-only in the alpha.
